calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Karen Farnsworth CSR #5162 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner, Zhi Fang Lei, is present.
Attorney, Clifford Y Wang, present representing and acting as the Cantonese interpreter for the petitioner.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name. Clifford Y Wang is sworn to interpret from Ensglish to Cantonse. Zhi Fang Lei is sworn and examined by the Court.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the proposed change of name made at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: JIG FONG LUI. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
